title: rosa glauca var. delasoiei
intro: Rosa glauca var. delasoiei, also known as the 'Blue Leaved Rose', is a variety of the Rosa glauca plant, characterized by its blue-gray foliage and pink to purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in soothing skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Rosa glauca var. delasoiei include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and act as a natural remedy for colds and fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties.
